hotel_name: The St. Regis Longboat Key Resort

reviews.title: Expected a lot more from a luxury hotel!
reviews.positives: The staff was amazing! Spa facilities are beautiful!
reviews.negatives: Plastic mattress covers that made us sweat and sleep terribly! Ventilation system woke us up with cooking fumes from restaurant.

reviews.title: it was a very nice place. I think a bit overpriced for what they have to offer.
reviews.positives: The property was in a great location. It was very attractive.
reviews.negatives: we had a wait over an hour for our room and we didn’t even arrive until almost 4 o’clock. On the bathtub when you get out of the bathtub, you hit your back on the faucet. It is placed in a bad location so it’s not the best for people who like bathing.
